Air Suspension.title: Air Suspension Compressor Noise
Air Suspension.issue: Loud compressor operation during height adjustment

Air Suspension.title: Suspension Height Sensor Calibration
Air Suspension.issue: Uneven ride height or height sensor faults

Battery & Charging.title: Charge Port Door Sticking
Battery & Charging.issue: Charge port door won't open or close smoothly
Battery & Charging.fix: Replace charge port door motor and lubricate contacts

Battery & Charging.title: Slow DC Fast Charging
Battery & Charging.issue: DC fast charging speed reduced to 50-70% of normal
Battery & Charging.fix: Update onboard charger firmware, check thermal management

Exterior & Panels.title: Door Alignment & Panel Gaps
Exterior & Panels.issue: Front door doesn't align properly, large gaps at seams
Exterior & Panels.fix: Adjust door hinges, align panel gaps to spec

Electronics & Software.title: Touchscreen Freezing Issues
Electronics & Software.issue: Infotainment system freezes or becomes unresponsive
Electronics & Software.fix: Update MCU firmware, factory reset if needed
